content.en:
"Endless Great Ancestor, are you talking about trading a thousand silver liquids with us with immeasurable blood gold stones?"

The Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain thought that he had misheard, so he confirmed again.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Camel Mountain Great Ancestor tried to calm himself down, and then asked, "I wonder how many Infinite Blood Gold Stones the Endless Great Ancestor has for trading?"

"Trade 10,000 first!"

Ye Tian said.

10,000 pieces!

This number surprised the Camel Mountain Great Ancestor extremely much, this is a very huge number, if he facilitates the completion of this transaction, he will also get a part of the reward of the immeasurable blood gold stone!

A resource like the Immeasurable Blood Gem had not been available to him for a long time.

If there was a part of the immeasurable blood gold stone, he was sure to impact the second full-body refinement.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I have to discuss it with the other high-level leaders of the Outside Alliance first, and then give you an answer!"

The Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain hurriedly said.

"Okay, I'll wait here!" Ye Tian said, sitting cross-legged and waiting silently.

And the Camel Mountain Great Ancestor found the other high-level leaders of the Outside Alliance for the first time, after all, he couldn't move all the Thousand Dao Silver Liquid of the Outside Alliance without permission, and he had to get the consent of the other high-level leaders.

It didn't take long for the Camel Mountain Great Ancestor to obtain the consent of the other high-level leaders, and even the authorization of a deputy alliance leader.

......

Jingling Mountain Branch.

The Camel Mountain Ancestor came back and officially cooperated with Ye Tian to trade.

And this time it was not only the Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain who came, but also another fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life form, who was also a high-level member of the Camel Mountain Great Ancestor's faction.

Ye Tian discussed with these two Great Ancestors for a while and determined the transaction price.

An immeasurable blood gold stone can be exchanged for thirty drops of a thousand silver liquids, which is a very reasonable price.

Soon.

The first transaction was completed, and Ye Tian exchanged 10,000 pieces of immeasurable blood gold stones for 300,000 drops of Thousand Paths of Silver Liquid from the Outer Alliance.

The Outer Realm Alliance had so many Thousand Dao Silver Liquids, and he didn't expect it.

"It seems that the Outer Realm Alliance has mastered a place where a thousand silver liquids are born, and the reserves of a thousand silver liquids are definitely quite a lot!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he didn't need much of a thousand silver liquids, so he didn't continue trading.

Of course.

He also offered to trade with him with several other materials he needed, but the Out-of-bounds said no.

But even if there were, they wouldn't trade it.

After all, the value of those materials is much rarer and more precious than the Infinite Blood Gold Stone!

......

Ruins of stone towers.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to fuse those thousand silver liquids into a thousand golden liquids.

Airplanes!!!

Drops of thousands of silver liquids fused together, and it only took sixteen drops of thousands of silver liquids to fuse a thousand golden liquids.

And he has 300,000 drops of Qiandao gold liquid in his hands, which is enough to fuse tens of thousands of drops of Qiandao gold liquid, which is enough for him.

Now that he has the immeasurable blood gold stone and a thousand golden liquids in his hands, he only needs to gather the other four materials.

this day.

Ye Tian finally got the news about the Divine Blood Soil, and there was a Divine Blood Soil in the Xuanqi Territory, but almost all of them were controlled by the top forces.

The Divine Blood Breath is very useful, and he can grow some rare resources.

For example, the immeasurable blood spirit tree that Ye Tian obtained before could be planted and survived in the Divine Blood Breath.

Many resources take a long time to develop, but in the Divine Blood Habitat, it can be reduced by a lot of time, so many of the top powers will not trade the Divine Blood Habitat.

And this time, there is a big force that is willing to trade its own divine blood.

This great force is the Remnant Heaven Pavilion!

The strength of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion is not weak, although it is not as good as the Xuanqi Pavilion, but it also has a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage.

This time, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion was in big trouble, so he got Ye Tianzai to buy the Divine Blood Soil, so he was ready to ask him for help with the Divine Blood Soil.

"Let's go to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion first to see the situation!"

Ye Tian soon came to the headquarters of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and here he met the headquarters pavilion master of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, that is, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, the Sunset Great Ancestor!

"Sunset Ancestor, you want to exchange the divine blood for my help, what is the so-called matter?" Ye Tian asked.

The Sunset Great Ancestor hurriedly said, "Endless Great Ancestor, we have a total of three fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in our Remnant Heaven Pavilion. This time, one of our Fourth-Stage 4 high-level immeasurable lifeforms from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion is trapped in the Immeasurable Ruins, so I want to ask you to help rescue him. Once delivered, we will offer the blood of the gods!"

"One of your fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms is trapped in the immeasurable realm ruins, why do you want me to help? You are not sure yourself? Even if you are not sure, you can find the top fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of other forces!" Ye Tian said curiously.

Sunset Ancestor said helplessly: "Endless Ancestor, the most powerful person in our Remnant Heaven Pavilion is me, but I have only completed three full-body tempering, and my strength is limited, so there is no hope at all." As for the other forces, they didn't dare to take risks, they were also afraid of losing a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform. Therefore, other forces are not willing to help!"

"Then why do you think I'll be willing to help?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Sunset Ancestor said: "We can only try, if the Endless Ancestor is unwilling, we will have to find another way!"

"I agreed!"

Ye Tian said without hesitation.

The other Great Ancestors were afraid to venture into the Infinite Realm Ruins, but he was not afraid.

"Thank you Endless Ancestor!"

The Sunset Ancestor was very excited, he knew a little about Ye Tian's current strength, five times of full body tempering, plus his own combat power far surpassed the same level, so his current strength was almost invincible in the fourth stage!

If Ye Tian made a move, there was a great hope of successfully rescuing the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

"Tell me the location!"

Ye Tian urged.

The Sunset Ancestor immediately informed Ye Tian of the location, and provided Ye Tian with a passage to enter the Infinite Realm Ruins.

This passage is controlled by the Taiyuan Palace, allowing the Great Ancestors of other forces to enter the Immeasurable Realm Ruins, and only need to pay a certain fee.

And the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion entered the Infinite Realm Ruins through this passage, and the place where the accident happened was not too far away from that passage.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian, under the leadership of the Sunset Great Ancestor, came to the passage of the Taichen Palace, where a Great Ancestor of the Taichen Palace was in charge.

This Great Ancestor is also a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and he has completed seven full-body tempering, so his strength is very strong.

After the Sunset Ancestor paid the fee, he let Ye Tian enter the Infinite Realm Ruins.

After entering the Infinite Realm Ruins, Ye Tian rushed to the place where the Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion had an accident.
